info.name: Cloudflare Logpush API
info.description:
The Cloudflare Logpush API allows developers to configure jobs that push logs to storage services, SIEMs, and log management providers. It supports datasets including HTTP requests, firewall events, DNS logs, and spectrum events with configurable output options and filtering.

Contact Support:
 Name: Cloudflare Support
